title: trust.score.updated
description: Published by Rating Service after recalculating a user's trust score. Consumed by Discovery Service to update scan pool visibility and request-send throttling.
_comment_projection: Discovery Service maintains a read-side cache of trust scores. This event is the write to that projection — Rating Service never calls Discovery Service directly (Dependency Inversion at the service boundary).
_comment_badge_level: badge_level is the discretised tier derived from new_score. Consumers use the tier, not the raw score, for business rules. This shields consumers from scoring algorithm changes — update the thresholds in Rating Service without changing Discovery Service logic.

badge_level.description: Tier derived from new_score. trusted: high score, Trusted badge shown. standard: mid-range. restricted: low score, suspended from discovery.

request_limit.description: Maximum connection requests this user may send per day. Derived from badge_level. Discovery Service enforces this as a throttle.
